title: Resolver returning error for a skill ref MUST emit managed_ref_resolve_failed and stop with reason=error before any turn
description: startup resolution is fail-fast. When the AVP resolver protocol fails for any Commission-declared managed asset (resolver service unreachable, ref not understood, content malformed), the agent MUST emit managed_ref_resolve_failed carrying the kind/id/error, then agent_stopped(reason=error) before any model turn. Pins the contract that supervisors learn about stale or broken refs at startup, never via silent surface degradation.

skill:style-guide.error: skill content not found in store

forbidden_events.label: no model turn runs when a managed ref fails to resolve
